testcase.name: test_invalid_postcode

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected found=False for invalid postcode, got {'found': True, 'straat': '1 juli-weg', 'stad': 'Maastricht', 'postcode': 'INVALID'} assert True == False + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfff3a20b44c0>('found') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfff3a20b44c0> = {'found': True, 'postcode': 'INVALID', 'stad': 'Maastricht', 'straat': '1 juli-weg'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_checkout_address_lookup.py:47: in test_invalid_postcode assert data.get("found") == False, f"Expected found=False for invalid postcode, got {data}" E AssertionError: Expected found=False for invalid postcode, got {'found': True, 'straat': '1 juli-weg', 'stad': 'Maastricht', 'postcode': 'INVALID'} E assert True == False E + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfff3a20b44c0>('found') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfff3a20b44c0> = {'found': True, 'postcode': 'INVALID', 'stad': 'Maastricht', 'straat': '1 juli-weg'}.get
